object_refs.label: Enron reports second quarter 1998 earnings of $0.42 per share

data.subject: Enron reports second quarter 1998 earnings of $0.42 per share
data.snippet: Archived second-quarter 1998 earnings release describing continued wholesale growth and contract execution.

object_refs.label: Enron reports third quarter 1998 earnings and raises the annual dividend

data.subject: Enron reports third quarter 1998 earnings and raises the annual dividend
data.snippet: Archived third-quarter 1998 earnings release covering wholesale growth, retail expansion, and dividend increase.

object_refs.label: FY1998 selected financial data

data.subject: FY1998 selected financial data
data.snippet: Operating revenue was $31.26B, net income was $703M, total assets were $29.35B, shareholders' equity was $7.05B, and diluted EPS was $1.01.

object_refs.label: Enron reports increased earnings results for the first quarter of 1999

data.subject: Enron reports increased earnings results for the first quarter of 1999
data.snippet: Archived first-quarter 1999 earnings release describing wholesale strength, retail contracting, and growing credit-market exposure.

object_refs.label: FY1999 selected financial data

data.subject: FY1999 selected financial data
data.snippet: Operating revenue was $40.11B, net income was $893M, total assets were $33.38B, shareholders' equity was $9.57B, and diluted EPS was $1.10.

object_refs.label: Q4 1999 annual earnings release

data.subject: Q4 1999 annual earnings release
data.snippet: Enron reported full-year 1999 revenues of $40.0B, net income of $957M before nonrecurring items, annual diluted EPS of $1.18, and fourth-quarter diluted EPS of $0.31.

object_refs.label: Enron launched its first online emissions allowance auction

data.subject: Enron launched its first online emissions allowance auction
data.snippet: Enron said EnronOnline would host the first online sulfur dioxide emissions allowance auction and planned to run the auctions monthly.

object_refs.label: Enron files its Form 10-K for fiscal year 1999

data.subject: Enron files its Form 10-K for fiscal year 1999
data.snippet: Annual report and Form 10-K filing covering the fiscal year ended December 31, 1999.

object_refs.label: Enron signed a $610M long-term electricity agreement with IBM

data.subject: Enron signed a $610M long-term electricity agreement with IBM
data.snippet: Enron Energy Services said it would supply or procure electricity for IBM under a ten-year agreement valued at $610M.

object_refs.label: Q1 2000 earnings release

data.subject: Q1 2000 earnings release
data.snippet: Enron reported first-quarter revenues of $13.1B, net income of $338M, and diluted EPS of $0.40.

object_refs.label: Enron announced a cash offer for MG plc

data.subject: Enron announced a cash offer for MG plc
data.snippet: Enron said its recommended cash offer valued MG plc at $446M and would extend Enron's business model into metals.

object_refs.label: EnronOnline passed $50B of transaction value in 2000

data.subject: EnronOnline passed $50B of transaction value in 2000
data.snippet: Enron said EnronOnline had exceeded $50B of transaction value in calendar 2000 and had already beaten its yearly projection.

object_refs.label: Enron and Blockbuster announced a 20-year on-demand service deal

data.subject: Enron and Blockbuster announced a 20-year on-demand service deal
data.snippet: Enron Broadband Services and Blockbuster announced a 20-year exclusive agreement to launch an entertainment-on-demand service.

object_refs.label: Q2 2000 earnings release

data.subject: Q2 2000 earnings release
data.snippet: Enron reported second-quarter revenues of $16.9B, net income of $289M, and diluted EPS of $0.34.

object_refs.label: Enron launched Clickpaper.com for the forest products market

data.subject: Enron launched Clickpaper.com for the forest products market
data.snippet: Enron Industrial Markets launched Clickpaper.com as an Internet transaction system for pulp, paper, and wood commodities.

object_refs.label: Q3 2000 earnings release

data.subject: Q3 2000 earnings release
data.snippet: Enron reported third-quarter revenues of $30.0B, net income of $292M, and diluted EPS of $0.34.

object_refs.label: Fitch baseline senior debt rating

data.subject: Fitch baseline senior debt rating
data.snippet: Enron's senior debt was listed at BBB+ in the 2000 financial highlights.

object_refs.label: FY2000 Form 10-K
FY2000 Form 10-K

data.subject: FY2000 Form 10-K
data.snippet: Operating revenue was $100.79B, net income was $979M, total assets were $65.50B, shareholders' equity was $11.47B, and diluted EPS was $1.12.

object_refs.label: Moody's baseline senior debt rating

data.subject: Moody's baseline senior debt rating
data.snippet: Enron's senior debt was listed at Baa1 in the 2000 financial highlights.

object_refs.label: S&P baseline senior debt rating

data.subject: S&P baseline senior debt rating
data.snippet: Enron's senior debt was listed at BBB+ in the 2000 financial highlights.

object_refs.label: Q4 2000 annual earnings release

data.subject: Q4 2000 annual earnings release
data.snippet: Enron publicly reported recurring annual diluted EPS of $1.47 for 2000 and fourth-quarter diluted EPS of $0.41.

object_refs.label: PG&E files for Chapter 11 protection

data.subject: PG&E files for Chapter 11 protection
data.snippet: SEC filing record documenting PG&E's April 6, 2001 bankruptcy filing.

object_refs.label: PG&E entered Chapter 11

data.subject: PG&E entered Chapter 11
data.snippet: PG&E's Chapter 11 filing made California power-counterparty risk a public fact before later Enron branch points tied to power trading and structured deals.

object_refs.label: Q1 2001 earnings release

data.subject: Q1 2001 earnings release
data.snippet: Enron publicly reported first-quarter diluted EPS of $0.47, revenues of $50.1B, and net income of $406M.

object_refs.label: Vice chairman Cliff Baxter resigned

data.subject: Vice chairman Cliff Baxter resigned
data.snippet: Enron's archived 2001 press chronology records Cliff Baxter's resignation on May 2, 2001.

object_refs.label: FERC imposed Western mitigation and opened the refund path

data.subject: FERC imposed Western mitigation and opened the refund path
data.snippet: The June 19, 2001 FERC action turned California power-market conduct and refund exposure into a concrete public regulatory fact.

object_refs.label: FERC imposed mitigation and opened the California refund path

data.subject: FERC imposed mitigation and opened the California refund path
data.snippet: Public reporting on the June 19, 2001 FERC action put Enron and other sellers on notice that California crisis sales would face a refund and mitigation regime.

object_refs.label: Q2 2001 earnings release

data.subject: Q2 2001 earnings release
data.snippet: Enron publicly reported second-quarter diluted EPS of $0.45 and net income of $404M.

object_refs.label: Jeffrey Skilling resigns as chief executive officer

data.subject: Jeffrey Skilling resigns as chief executive officer
data.snippet: Public resignation record that marks the executive transition during Enron's disclosure spiral.

object_refs.label: Jeff Skilling resigned as chief executive

data.subject: Jeff Skilling resigned as chief executive
data.snippet: Enron announced Skilling's resignation for personal reasons and said Kenneth Lay would resume the president and chief executive role.

object_refs.label: Q3 2001 loss announcement

data.subject: Q3 2001 loss announcement
data.snippet: Enron announced $1.01B of after-tax non-recurring charges, which resulted in a net loss for the quarter.

object_refs.label: Enron announced a third-quarter loss

data.subject: Enron announced a third-quarter loss
data.snippet: The company disclosed $1.01B in after-tax non-recurring charges and said the quarter ended in a net loss.

object_refs.label: SEC requested information about related-party transactions

data.subject: SEC requested information about related-party transactions
data.snippet: Enron said the SEC had asked it to voluntarily provide information about certain related-party transactions.

object_refs.label: Moody's kept Enron under review for downgrade

data.subject: Moody's kept Enron under review for downgrade
data.snippet: Public credit-rating reporting showed Enron's investment-grade status was under acute pressure as liquidity concerns deepened.

object_refs.label: Moody's cut Enron to Baa2 and kept it under review

data.subject: Moody's cut Enron to Baa2 and kept it under review
data.snippet: Moody's lowered Enron's senior unsecured debt to Baa2 and kept the rating under review for downgrade.

object_refs.label: Board formed a special committee and the SEC opened a formal investigation

data.subject: Board formed a special committee and the SEC opened a formal investigation
data.snippet: Enron said its board appointed a special committee and that the SEC had opened a formal investigation into the matters under review.

object_refs.label: FW: Third Quarter Review of Northern and Transwestern

data.subject: FW: Third Quarter Review of Northern and Transwestern
data.snippet:
-----Original Message-----
From: 	Walden, Clint  
Sent:	Wednesday, October 31, 2001 3:56 AM
To:	Butts, Bob; Peng, Gary
Cc:	Causey, Richard
Subject:	Third Quarter Review of Northern and Transwestern

	
FYI, 

Andersen has agreed that they will be able to issue review reports on the pipelines based on the following terms:

1.  The review opinions must be restricted to the lenders only.
2.  There must be a substantial footnote on the "overhang" issues (i.e., SEC investigation, potential bankruptcy, asset carryvalues in certain situations, etc.)
3.  The review opinion will contain an emphasis of
